name: Grilled Chili-Rubbed Lamb Chops
recipeIngredient: 16 rib lamb chops each about 1 1/2 inches thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the lamb chops.
2. Prepare a hot pepper jelly (recipe follows) for serving as an accompaniment.
3. In a small bowl, combine the chili powder, cumin, thyme, sugar, salt, allspice, and black pepper.
4. Sprinkle the spice mixture evenly over the lamb chops.
5. Refrigerate the chops, covered, for at least 4 hours or overnight to allow the rub to penetrate the meat.
6. Preheat a grill with glowing coals or turn on the broiler.
7. Grill or broil the lamb chops 4 inches from the heat source for 5 to 7 minutes on each side for medium-rare meat.
8. Serve the grilled lamb chops with the hot pepper jelly.
Serves 8.
